verses.text: A masa thuciamna nangawn in biakna zia ding leh biakna ding mun tawh kisai ngeina na nei tei sam hi
Puanbuk khat kibawl a, a puanung dei pen Siangtho Mun kici a, tua sungah meivak, sabuai, leh Ompihna Anlum kikoih hi
Tua Siangtho Mun a kideina zomah Siangtho Pen Mun a kici a dei dang khat om leuleu hi

Tua sungah paknamtui halna ding kham kibawl biakna tau leh kham tawh a kizut Thuciamna Singkuang om hi. Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah manna anlum a kikoihna kham beel, tehno nei-in a hing Aaron' ciangkhut leh thukhamte a kigelhna suangpek nihte kikoih hi
Tua Thuciamna Singkuang tung sanah Pasian' ompihna lim ahi kherub nihte om a, tua kherub nihte in hehpihna tokhom liimsun uh hi. Hih nate' thu tu-in a neng a tawngin i gen khinzo kei hi
Hih bang tengin a kibawl khit ciangin a dei puanung sungah nisim a nasep uh a sem dingin siampite a lut hi
Ahi zongin a dei sungnung sungah Siampi Lianpenpa bek kum khatin khatvei pai a, theihloh manin amah leh mite' khialhna hangin ganhing sisan tawh biakpiakna a bawl hi
A puanung inndei a om laiteng a sungnung ahi, a Siangtho Pen Mun a kihong nailo ahihna thu Kha Siangtho in hong kilangsak hi
Hih bang omzia pen tuhun lai thu a lahna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian tungah a kipia letsongte leh ganhing tawh biaknate in a bia mite' lungsim siangsak zolo hi
Zu leh an, leh pumpi sian'suahna ngeina tuamtuamte hi bek a, Pasian in na khempeuh a puahphat hun ma kikal sungteng zatding ngeina ahi hi
Ahi zongin tu-in a hoihzaw thu a semding Siampi Lianpen Khrih hong tung khinta a, ama lutna biakbuk pen a kipiangsak tawm, khut tawh a kibawl biakbuk hiloin a lianzaw, a cingtaakzaw mun ahi hi

Siangtho Pen Mun-ah a tawntungin a kimang dingin khatvei bek Khrih a va lut ciangin biakpiakna dingin keel sisan leh bawngno sisante va keng loin ama sisan va keng a, eite-a' dingin tawntung hotkhiatna a hong ngahsak hi
Keel sisan, bawngtal sisan, leh bawngla kihaltum vute, biakna vai-in a sianglo mite tungah a kitheh ciangin biakna vai-in mite' pum tung siangthosak thei ahih leh

tawntung Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian tungah a cingtaak biakpiakna dingin Khrih in a piak ama sisan in na tam semkhia zozaw ding a, a nungta Pasian' na i septheihna dingin bangmahin a kimanglo nasepna panin ama sisan in i lungsim hong siangsak ding hi

Thuciamna masa in a huamkhak mite, a mawhna panun a suahtak theihna ding uh ngeina om pen a si suak khinta ahih manin, Pasian' sap mite in a ciamsa tawntung thupha a ngahtheihna dingun Khrih in thuciamna thak a hong vaihawm ahi hi
Mi khat in a sih khit ciangin a gamhluah dingin a deihpa lai-in ciamtehin a koih leh a laibawlpa a sih phot ding kisam hi
A laibawlpa a hin' laiteng tua lai kizang theilo a, a sih khit ciangin kizang thei bek hi
Tua mah bangin thuciamna masa zong sisan a kizat ciangin thu suak thei pan hi
Moses in zong mite tungah Thukham sunga om thute a piak lai-in bawngno sisan, keel sisan, leh tui sungah puknah leh tuumul san diahin, tuate tawh Thukham laibu leh mite theh a
“Pasian in note tungah a hong piak thuciamna sisan ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua banah Moses in Biakbuk leh biakna-in a kizang a sunga na om khempeuh zong sisan a theh hi
Thukham kizatna sungah na khempeuh sisan tawh kisian'suah a, sisan a kiluan'sak khit ciang bekin mawhna kimaisak thei pan hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Biakna-in Khrih A Kipiakna In Mawhna Maisak

verses.text: A taktak a hilo vantung limte pen hih bangin sian'suahna kibawl hi. Ahi zongin vantung nate in hih sangin a hoihzaw biakpiakna kisam hi
Tua ahih manin a lim ahi mihingte' bawl Siangtho Mun sungah Jesuh pailo a, vantung mahmahah va pai-in Pasian' omna-ah eite' tangin tu-in amah a va kilaak ahi hi
Kum simin Siangtho Pen Mun-ah Jew Siampi Lianpente amau' sisan a hilo, ganhing sisan tawh a pai zelzel bangun amah va pai themthum lo hi

Tua bangin va pai zelzel hi leh leitung pian'cil-a kipanin a va thuak zelzel ding ahi hi. Ahi zongin amah biakna-in a va kipiakna hangin a kimang paisuak a suahtheihna dingin mawh maisakna dingin hun bei kuan ciangin amah khatvei a va kipia hi
Mi khempeuh khatvei si-in, tua khit ciangin Pasian' thukhenna a thuakding ahih mah bangin
mi tampite' mawhna a thuak dingin Khrih zong khatvei bek a kipia hi. A nihveina hong kilatkik ciangin mawhna thu tawh kisai nasem ding hi nawnloin, lawptakin amah a ngak mite a honkhia ding ahi hi.
